title: BYOK Key Access Monitor
description: Detects when a Bring-Your-Own-Key (BYOK) encryption key becomes inaccessible. Every 5 minutes it polls the Dynatrace Account Management Notifications API (BYOK_REVOKED / BYOK_ACTIVATED) via a small Run JavaScript task, ingests per-record custom events, then uses NATIVE workflow actions (conditions, Send email, HTTP request with Credential Vault auth) to alert and open/resolve an external incident. No native BYOK trigger is assumed. See README.md > Getting Started.

fetch_byok_notifications.name: fetch_byok_notifications
fetch_byok_notifications.description: Code-only step: OAuth (vault) -> Account Management Notifications API (last 10m) -> parse, dedupe, persistence-gate, ingest per-record custom events. Returns flags + text for the native tasks below.

alert_email_byok_revoked.name: alert_email_byok_revoked
alert_email_byok_revoked.description: NATIVE Send email — severe alert when one or more BYOK keys are revoked. Edit recipients in the UI.

input.subject: SEVERE: Dynatrace cannot access BYOK key — action required

create_incident_byok_revoked.name: create_incident_byok_revoked
create_incident_byok_revoked.description: NATIVE HTTP request — open a severity-1 incident (ServiceNow / generic webhook). Auth via Credential Vault. Fires only when a revoke passes the persistence safety gate.

input.payload:
{
  "severity": 1,
  "status": "open",
  "short_description": "Dynatrace BYOK key access lost",
  "description": "{{ result('fetch_byok_notifications').impactText }}\n\nEnvironment UUID: {{ result('fetch_byok_notifications').primaryRevoked.environmentUuid }}\nKey name: {{ result('fetch_byok_notifications').primaryRevoked.keyName }}\nNotification date: {{ result('fetch_byok_notifications').primaryRevoked.date }}\nSeverity: {{ result('fetch_byok_notifications').primaryRevoked.severity }}\nAffected key count: {{ result('fetch_byok_notifications').incidentCount }}",
  "environmentUuid": "{{ result('fetch_byok_notifications').primaryRevoked.environmentUuid }}",
  "keyName": "{{ result('fetch_byok_notifications').primaryRevoked.keyName }}",
  "notificationDate": "{{ result('fetch_byok_notifications').primaryRevoked.date }}",
  "dedupeKey": "{{ result('fetch_byok_notifications').primaryRevoked.dedupeKey }}",
  "notificationType": "BYOK_REVOKED"
}

recovery_email_byok_activated.name: recovery_email_byok_activated
recovery_email_byok_activated.description: NATIVE Send email — recovery notice when BYOK key access is restored. Edit recipients in the UI.

input.subject: INFO: Dynatrace BYOK key access restored

resolve_incident_byok_activated.name: resolve_incident_byok_activated
resolve_incident_byok_activated.description: NATIVE HTTP request — resolve/update the external incident on recovery. Auth via Credential Vault. Optional — disable or repoint if you do not manage incidents externally.

input.payload:
{
  "severity": 3,
  "status": "resolved",
  "short_description": "Dynatrace BYOK key access restored",
  "description": "BYOK key access restored.\n\nEnvironment UUID: {{ result('fetch_byok_notifications').primaryActivated.environmentUuid }}\nKey name: {{ result('fetch_byok_notifications').primaryActivated.keyName }}\nNotification date: {{ result('fetch_byok_notifications').primaryActivated.date }}",
  "environmentUuid": "{{ result('fetch_byok_notifications').primaryActivated.environmentUuid }}",
  "keyName": "{{ result('fetch_byok_notifications').primaryActivated.keyName }}",
  "notificationDate": "{{ result('fetch_byok_notifications').primaryActivated.date }}",
  "dedupeKey": "{{ result('fetch_byok_notifications').primaryActivated.dedupeKey }}",
  "notificationType": "BYOK_ACTIVATED"
}
